description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise lounge, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and plush for comfort. Two additional smaller throw pillows are placed on the chaise section, enhancing its inviting appearance. The armrests are straight, wide, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive silhouette. The sofa stands on short, cylindrical legs that are minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal. The overall design is clean, contemporary, and suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern light gray sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, plush cushions, and straight padded armrests. It features a clean, contemporary design with short, subtle legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sectional layout, three large seat cushions, three backrest cushions, two throw pillows, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension and the thickness of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the alignment of the sofa's three main sections.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sofa's depth, the right armrest, and the end of the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose backrest cushions, with two smaller throw pillows on the chaise; all cushions are uniform in size and rectangular, arranged in a sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest with a clean, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, cylindrical legs positioned at the corners and possibly a central support, minimally visible, likely made of wood or metal with a simple, functional design.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented into three sections by the loose backrest cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
